ValidationRule.description: 创建之后就不能修改状态及分配人以外字段
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IF( ISBLANK(PRIORVALUE( DueDate__c )), false, OR(ISCHANGED( Subject__c ), ISCHANGED( Description__c ), ISCHANGED( Priority__c ), ISCHANGED( DueDate__c )))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You can only modify the ticket status and Assigned To after the task has been submitted!
